pageContext.name: Chandler Bing 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: Next in the FRIENDS™ Chibi Coin Series includes the guy with the best sarcastic humor, Chandler Bing™!   This delightful 1oz pure silver coin has been shaped and colored to resemble Chandler as Chibi art. It shows him holding his pet chicken in his wool waistcoat (heh). The obverse of the coin bears the Ian Rank-Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II, confirming it is legal tender.   The coin arrives in a FRIENDS™-themed case and includes a large window, perfect for display. The Certificate of Authenticity is printed on the back which further confirms the coin's legal tender status, along with its unique serial number in the limited mintage of 2,000 coins.   Remember the antics of Chandler today!
